creator: stephen@math.missouri.edu
text:
I bet that this is an open-axiom issue instead of a FreeBSD issue. 
Could the originator of the PR get on an open-axiom mailing list and 
inquire about it there?  If it is broken on other systems as well, then 
it is not a FreeBSD specific issue.  My personal experience is that the 
people on the open-axiom mailing lists are helpful to these kinds of 
queries.

Thanks, Stephen
